title: Pruitt Keeps His Badge in His Pocket
description: Mackintosh approaches Sergeant Pruitt near the front of the store and speaks to him in a low voice. Pruitt listens, nods once, and then does not move toward the counter. He does not produce his badge. He completes his purchase and moves toward the exit at a deliberate, unhurried pace — and moves toward the exit at a deliberate, unhurried pace. The conversation lasted less than thirty seconds. Whatever Mackintosh asked, the answer was no.
